## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Testing

- [ ] Tested on macOS:
- [ ] Xcode version:
- [ ] Ran local Swift typecheck
- [ ] Ran the app from Xcode
- [ ] Confirmed the menu bar icon appears

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] No private CoreAudio APIs added
- [ ] No kernel extensions added
- [ ] No virtual audio device dependency added
- [ ] No microphone/input capture added
- [ ] No hidden audio recording or background audio processing added
- [ ] No unnecessary entitlements added
- [ ] AppleScript changes reviewed carefully
- [ ] New dependencies justified, if any
- [ ] README/docs updated if behavior changed

## App Support

If this adds or changes app support:

- [ ] The app exposes a public/scriptable volume API
- [ ] Unsupported apps remain read-only
- [ ] Limitations are documented
